Content: # Metronome > [!IMPORTANT] > This app is superseded by [https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome](https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome) Simple metronome app. [](https://f-droid.org/packages/de.moekadu.metronome/) [](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=de.moekadu.metronome) | ![screenshot-0](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/00.png) | ![screenshot-1](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/01.png) | ![screenshot-2](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/02.png) | ![screenshot-3](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/03.png) | ![screenshot-4](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/04.png) | |-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| # Functionality This app provides basic functionality like: * Setting speed manually or by "tap in" * If you use "tap in" while the metronome is running, the klicks should lock in to your taps. * Choose different sounds and individually adapt the volume * Save and load your current settings * Choose between light and dark theme * Show a notification, which supports "start" and "stop" # Help me improving the app If you like this app, but have ideas for improvement or are annoyed by some behaviour, please let me know. **License:** [GPLv3](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0)
Translation: # メトロノーム > [!IMPORTANT] > このアプリは [https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome](https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome) によって置き換えられています シンプルなメトロノームアプリ。 [](https://f-droid.org/packages/de.moekadu.metronome/) [](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=de.moekadu.metronome) | ![screenshot-0](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/00.png) | ![screenshot-1](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/01.png) | ![screenshot-2](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/02.png) | ![screenshot-3](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/03.png) | ![screenshot-4](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/04.png) | |-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| # 機能 このアプリは以下の基本機能を提供します: * 手動または「タップイン」による速度設定 * メトロノームが動作中に「タップイン」を使用すると、クリックがタップに同期します * 異なる音を選択し、音量を個別に調整可能 * 現在の設定を保存および読み込み * ライトテーマとダークテーマの選択 * 「開始」と「停止」をサポートする通知の表示 # アプリ改善のご協力をお願いします このアプリが気に入った場合、改善案や不便に感じる点があればお知らせください。 **ライセンス:** [GPLv3](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0)

RowTranslations.translatedContent: # メトロノーム
> [!IMPORTANT]
> このアプリは [https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome](https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome) によって置き換えられています
シンプルなメトロノームアプリ。
[
alt="F-Droidで入手"
height="80">](https://f-droid.org/packages/de.moekadu.metronome/)
[
alt="Google Playで入手"
height="80">](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=de.moekadu.metronome)

| ![screenshot-0](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/00.png) | ![screenshot-1](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/01.png) | ![screenshot-2](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/02.png) | ![screenshot-3](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/03.png) | ![screenshot-4](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/04.png) |
# 機能

RowTranslations.originContent: This app provides basic functionality like:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: このアプリは以下の基本機能を提供します:

RowTranslations.originContent: * Setting speed manually or by "tap in"
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * 手動または「タップイン」による速度設定

RowTranslations.originContent: * If you use "tap in" while the metronome is running, the klicks should lock in to your taps.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * メトロノームが動作中に「タップイン」を使用すると、クリックがタップに同期します

RowTranslations.originContent: * Choose different sounds and individually adapt the volume
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * 異なる音を選択し、音量を個別に調整可能

RowTranslations.originContent: * Save and load your current settings
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * 現在の設定を保存および読み込み

RowTranslations.originContent: * Choose between light and dark theme
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * ライトテーマとダークテーマの選択

RowTranslations.originContent: * Show a notification, which supports "start" and "stop"
RowTranslations.translatedContent: * 「開始」と「停止」をサポートする通知の表示
# アプリ改善のご協力をお願いします

RowTranslations.originContent: If you like this app, but have ideas for improvement or are annoyed by some behaviour, please let me know.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: このアプリが気に入った場合、改善案や不便に感じる点があればお知らせください。
**ライセンス:** [GPLv3](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0)
